_comment: KUMPLY Compliance L1 — Avalanche L1 (Subnet-EVM) chain config — see https://build.avax.network/docs/nodes/chain-configs/avalanche-l1s/avalanche-l1-configs
name: KUMPLY Compliance L1

consensus._comment: Snowman consensus parameters tuned for institutional-grade finality

validatorSet._comment: ACP-77 PoA validator set with off-chain governance via KumplyValidatorSetManager (ACP-99 compliant). KYB (Tier 4) required. ACP-77 continuous fee model: ~512 nAVAX/s per validator (~1.33 AVAX/month).

fees._comment: Native gas token KMP. Initial fees set low; dynamic multidimensional fees roadmap follows ACP-103 (ACP-83 is superseded).

interchain._comment: Avalanche Warp Messaging (AWM) + Interchain Token Transfer (ICTT) — required for cross-L1 attestation propagation
interchain._note: ICTT enables future KMP <-> AVAX bridging once the L1 is in production
